name: @gozd/electron
author: miyaoka
description: Gozd — Git Orchestrated Zone for Development. Electron main process for managing parallel AI agent development.

scripts.build:app: pnpm --filter @gozd/renderer build && pnpm build && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns && electron-builder --dir -c.buildVersion="$(git show -s --format=%cd --date=format:%Y%m%d-%H%M%S HEAD) $(git describe --always --dirty)"
